name: Meta Ad Library — Competitor Research
description: Open Meta Ad Library in India all-ads mode, search an advertiser page, and extract active campaign snippets.

steps: Extract results count, Library IDs, and visible ad snippets
advertiser_lookup.why: This is the highest-signal Meta workflow for active competitor campaign review.

errors.context: Many brands do not lead copy with the category keyword
errors.solution: Run this playbook with ADVERTISER set to the page name and use keyword searches separately.

steps.description: Open Meta Ad Library in India all-ads mode

steps.code: (() => { const input = document.querySelector("input[placeholder='Search by keyword or advertiser']"); if (!(input instanceof HTMLInputElement)) throw new Error('Meta Ad Library search input not found'); const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value')?.set; if (!setter) throw new Error('HTMLInputElement value setter unavailable'); setter.call(input, `{ADVERTISER}`); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); input.focus(); return { typed: input.value }; })()

(() => { const wanted = `{ADVERTISER}`.trim().toLowerCase(); const option = [...document.querySelectorAll("li[id^='pageID:'], [role='option']")].find((el) => (el.innerText || '').toLowerCase().includes(wanted)); if (!option) throw new Error(`Advertiser option not found: ${wanted}`); option.click(); return { clicked: (option.innerText || '').trim() }; })()

steps.description: Wait for advertiser results to load

steps.code: (() => { const text = document.body.innerText; const results = text.match(/~\d+ results/)?.[0] || null; const snippets = text.split(/Active\nLibrary ID:/).slice(1, 7).map((chunk) => (`Library ID:${chunk}`).slice(0, 1400)); return { advertiser: `{ADVERTISER}`, url: location.href, results, snippets }; })()
steps.description: Extract visible active ad snippets and result count
